scripts.build:icons: rsvg-convert -w 16 -h 16 icons/icon.svg -o icons/icon16.png && rsvg-convert -w 48 -h 48 icons/icon.svg -o icons/icon48.png && rsvg-convert -w 128 -h 128 icons/icon.svg -o icons/icon128.png
scripts.package: npm run build && zip -r tab-zap.zip manifest.json icons/icon16.png icons/icon48.png icons/icon128.png popup/popup.html popup/popup.css popup/popup.bundle.js
